hooks.command: file_path=$(echo "$1" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$file_path" == *.nix ]]; then nix fmt -- "$file_path" 2>/dev/null; fi
file_path=$(echo "$1" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$file_path" == *.yaml || "$file_path" == *.yml ]]; then nix run nixpkgs#yamllint -- -d relaxed "$file_path"; fi
